title: Casual pivot with emotional padding; embedded ask at the end
failure_mode: padding substrings ('sorry', 'recursivity') may match incidental keywords; classifier may ACK/PASS instead of engaging the embedded ask (FR-018)
invariant: ask-at-end position must dominate over stray padding substrings
rationale: The real ask ('what will the stock market be like tomorrow?') is at the end; the padding contains incidental substrings that trip the keyword classifier.
